column1: Yandy Diaz leads off for Boston with a strong track record of consistency, hitting safely in 80% of games and drawing a favorable platoon matchup on the road. Luis Arraez offers similar reliability in the two-hole for San Francisco, coming in hot with hits in half his recent games and also enjoying the platoon edge. Juan Soto and JJ Bleday round out the top options, both benefiting from lineup position and advantageous matchups, but Diaz’s steady profile stands out for Beat The Streak selections.
